environment: Exterior construction site – multi-level tubular scaffolding on building facade

hazards.hazard: Workers on upper scaffold level appear to lack guardrails or mid-rails on the open outer edge, creating an unprotected fall hazard at significant height
Lower-level workers handling and positioning scaffold tubes without visible fall-arrest equipment; body positioning near open scaffold edge increases fall risk
Workers on upper level wearing hard hats but fall-arrest harness tie-off anchor points cannot be confirmed, leaving fall-arrest system compliance unverified
Scaffold tubes being manually handled and extended outward by lower workers; dropped or shifting tube could strike workers below or on adjacent levels
No visible toe boards on scaffold platform edges; tools or materials could fall and strike workers on lower levels
